title: Voluntary Adversity
html:
Voluntary Adversity

The two-word phrase Yahir wrote on its own line in 2022 10 25 ahmad jamal stream, surrounded by jazz, ChatGPT product wedges, crypto pitches, and his early founder mantras — and which by 2025 had become his lived operating mode. Voluntary adversity is the deliberate choice to sit inside discomfort that you could trivially exit, on the bet that the discomfort is producing something the comfortable version of you couldn't. The thread runs through fear of not doing (2019, the axiom: "Fear of not doing is greater than fear of doing it"), through voluntary adversity (2022, the name), and into no runway discipline (2025, the lived form). Three names, one philosophy, written down at three different ages.

The 2022 articulation in the Ahmad-Jamal-stream note is intellectually loaded. Voluntary adversity sits next to two other lines that prevent it from collapsing into naive masochism: "spend your life force well" and "Giving 100% at most efficient rate: 60mph = 20mpg (long term), 120mph = 10mpg." The throughput-vs-efficiency observation is the load-bearing addition — the philosophy explicitly prices in burnout. Sustainable adversity, not the maximum kind. The same note carries the dad wisdom line "Impulse decision will kill you — dad", which functions as its complement: voluntary adversity is deliberate discomfort, not impulsive risk-taking. The philosophy is closer to Stoicism than to grind-culture.

By 2025 09 23 how im scraping by the philosophy is operational and non-abstract. The note is a P&L of survival tactics in the first weeks in Austin — overnight gym shifts, DoorDash cushion, $1.50/lb chicken thighs, Planet Fitness $15/mo refusal to upgrade, "sell my gun at a 50% discount to pay rent", "Plasma donation?!!" — interrupted only by moments where Yahir can't help himself: "I just got mad at myself mentally for spending $5.50 on a blended Horchata. I'm seriously making it out the mud." The horchata-shame line is the voluntary in voluntary adversity made literal — he is choosing the deprivation, monitoring himself for slippage, and treating the monitoring as itself the discipline. Self-funded Rankett, no raise, by choice.

The pattern reaches back further than 2022. The 2020 2020 04 23 go to diamond note — Munger maxims, mini-pet-mart job interview prep, Amazon FBA cold-outreach — is the proto-form, even before Yahir had the vocabulary. The marathon-walking aspirational item in 2020 11 15 scholarship essays todo is the same shape ("Walking a marathon" listed as a pre-college adventure-to-complete). Voluntary adversity is the philosophy he installed at 17 to make the Ford funded OSU trajectory rhyme with his Mexican-American small-town origin — deliberately staying close to discomfort even when the scholarship had bought him a way out of it. The principle has remained constant; the instruments have changed.

  • 2025 09 23 how im scraping by
  • first batch 2026 04 26
